title: Define staged optimization protocol for regression, benchmark, and random evaluations
description:
## Summary
Define the staged optimization protocol for workflow orchestration under plx-c2f8bb.

## Locked protocol
- Stage A: deterministic/associated-dataset reference check.
- Stage B: random generalization loop run (n=50, default days=180).
- Stage C: hard-gate random confirmation run (n=200) required before final accept.
- Stage D: decision synthesis from value()/assess_candidate() plus malfunction-routing signals.

## Policy defaults
- min_reference_delta=0.01
- max_generalization_drop=0.02
- No champion promotion in this workflow.

## Acceptance criteria
- A final accept decision is impossible without Stage C completion.
- Deterministic and random evidence must both be present for final decision.
